condition_notes: Minor fraying at waistband buttonhole area.
title: Tommy Hilfiger Mini Skirt — Dark Blue Denim
image_captions: Dark blue denim mini skirt with front pockets and a small Tommy Hilfiger flag logo on the left pocket.
Dark blue denim mini skirt with front pockets and a small Tommy Hilfiger flag logo on the left pocket.
Back view showing Tommy Hilfiger flag logo on back pocket, brass rivets with 'TOMMY HILFIGER' text visible.
Back view showing Tommy Hilfiger brand name on waistband, metal buttons with logo, and red stitching detail.
Neck tag reading Tommy Hilfiger Size 140. Care label showing 98% Cotton 2% Elastane.
Neck tag reading Verso/Al Reverso Size RN #77806 CA #20781. Care label showing 40% Cotton, 60% Polyester. Fabric tag reading 100% Cotton Exclusive of Decoration.
Back view showing dark blue denim mini skirt with red Tommy Hilfiger logo on waistband, two back pockets, and curved hemline.
Back view showing red 'Th' logo on waistband and Tommy Hilfiger flag patch on back pocket.
Horizontal tape measure showing 30cm at the waistband edge. Neck tag reading TOMMY.
Vertical tape measure showing 39cm at the hem edge.
enhanced_description:
Tommy Hilfiger Mini Skirt — Dark Blue Denim
Brand: Tommy Hilfiger
Size: 140
Condition: Good
Composition: 98% Cotton, 2% Elastane
Color: Dark Blue Denim

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 30cm
Length: 39cm

About the Piece
This classic Tommy Hilfiger mini skirt brings timeless style with a modern twist. Crafted in rich dark blue denim, it features the iconic red 'Th' logo on the waistband and signature flag patches on both pockets. The perfect blend of casual chic and brand recognition makes this a standout piece for any wardrobe.

Style Note: Casual Chic / Streetwear Aesthetic

Key Detail
Authentic Tommy Hilfiger branding includes brass rivets with text, metal buttons with logos, and red stitching details along the hemline.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Tommy Hilfiger items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
